debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
label : α
l : LabelledTree α
h : IsOrdered α inst✝ l
⊢ fastCheckMem α inst✝ label l = true ↔ label ∈ l

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
induction l with
  | leaf x =>
      simp [fastCheckMem]
  | node v left right ihL ihR =>
      have hL' : IsOrdered left := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.1
      have hR' : IsOrdered right := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.2.2.1
      have hL : ∀ x ∈ left, x ≤ v := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h.1
      have hR : ∀ x ∈ right, v ≤ x := by
        simpa [IsOrdered] using h.2.1
      by_cases hv : v = label
      · subst hv
        simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
      · have hv' : ¬ v == label := by
          simpa [beq_iff_eq] using hv
        by_cases hlt : label < v
        · have hnotR : ¬ LabelledTree.mem right label := by
            intro hm
            have : v ≤ label := hR label hm
            exact not_lt_of_ge this hlt
          have : (fastCheckMem label left = true ↔ label ∈ left) := ihL hL'
          simp [fastCheckMem, hv', hlt, LabelledTree.mem, this, hnotR]
        · have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_gt hlt
          have hnotL : ¬ LabelledTree.mem left label := by
            intro hm
            have : label ≤ v := hL label hm
            exact not_lt_of_ge this (lt_of_le_of_ne hge (Ne.symm hv))
          have : (fastCheckMem label right = true ↔ label ∈ right) := ihR hR'
          simp [fastCheckMem, hv', hlt, LabelledTree.mem, this, hnotL]
